item.title: Give Mom Warm Coffee All Year Long With This Ember Smart Mug Deal
item.description: If an Ember mug is at the top of Mom’s wish list, this sale is worth checking out.

item.title: Beatbot Pool-Cleaning Robots Are on Sale for a Limited Time
item.description: Get ready for summer with discounts on the best robot pool cleaners we’ve tested.

item.title: AI-Designed Drugs by a DeepMind Spinoff Are Headed to Human Trials
item.description: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg said at WIRED Health in London that the startup has built a “broad and exciting pipeline of new medicines.”

item.title: Designer Baby Companies Are in Turmoil
item.description: Bootstrap Bio and Manhattan Genomics, which were pursuing human embryo editing to prevent serious disease, have shut down.

item.title: The Latest Push to Extend Key US Spy Powers Is Still a Mess
item.description: A US surveillance program that lets the FBI view Americans’ communications without a warrant is up for renewal. A new bill aims to address mounting la...
